title: Snowy Optimized
body:
#
# ## Loaders Snowy Optimized is powered by Fabric, an innovative modding toolchain for Minecraft, designed for maximum efficiency and flexibility. ## Tweaks Snowy Optimized enhances your Minecraft experience with a variety of features and improvements, including: - Fps Boost - Full Brightness mod - Enhanced models - And much more! ## Minimal Mods Snowy Optimized maintains a streamlined mod count, capping at 15 mods (excluding necessary dependencies). This makes it ideal for older computers and lower-spec hardware. ## Compatibility Snowy Optimized is for versions 1.20.1x and has been tested with the Minecraft Launcher. ## Support For any issues or support, join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/2GWSjUQJtC) Server. ## Installation (Modrinth App) 1. Download and install the Modrinth app 2. Login with your Minecraft account 3. Select "Browse" on the Left side 4. Search for "Snowy Optimized" 5. Select and download the first option ## Screenshot
